description.value:
At 3rd level, you learn to strike with crippling force, blending in the energy of your soul. Force damage you deal also counts as the corresponding of the nature release you gained from this clan for the purposes of interacting with jutsu, features, and traits, as well as overcoming Resistances and Immunities and capitalizing on Vulnerabilities. These damage types can trigger the damage of the Bruised condition when dealt.

Also, once per round when you make a weapon attack or cast a Taijutsu or Bukijutsu that deals Force damage, you can force affected creatures to make a Strength or Charisma Saving Throw vs your Taijutsu Save DC.

On a failure, they gain 1 rank of Bruised and immediately suffer the damage of their Bruised condition. When Bruised in this way, the damage dealt can either be Force damage or the damage that corresponds with the nature release you gained from this clan. If a creature fails their saving throw by 5 or more, they instead gain 2 ranks. Ranks of Bruised applied from this feature cannot turn Bruised into Staggered.

At 7th level, this can occur up to twice per round. If a creature has three or more ranks of Bruised that were inflicted by this feature, they also gain 1 rank of the condition that responds with the nature release you gain from this clan.
